overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a female character exploring a desert canyon environment. The character walks past a large Imperial shuttle spacecraft and ascends a rocky slope toward a distant settlement in a sun-baked, arid landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon floor with parked spacecraft

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canyon path toward the large spacecraft

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation forming the canyon wall
large white Imperial Lambda-class shuttle with folded wings
cluster of buildings at the base of the far canyon wall
scattered rocks and sand on the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow desert canyon floor with towering rock walls on the left. A large Imperial shuttle dominates the right side of the frame, parked on the sandy ground. In the distance, a small settlement is visible against the canyon cliffs.

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the rocky slope
rounding the rock outcrop reveals the settlement and shuttle from a new angle

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky incline, navigating around boulders toward the distant settlement

entered.detail: large boulder formation being navigated around

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and begins ascending a rocky slope, moving away from the canyon floor. The large rock outcrop occludes the view temporarily before the settlement comes into clearer view ahead. The Imperial shuttle remains visible in the background on the right, now seen from a higher vantage point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the narrow floor of a desert canyon up onto a rocky vantage point overlooking a distant settlement. It begins with the character walking along the sandy ground, flanked by towering rock walls on the left and a massive Imperial shuttle parked on the right. As the character turns left, the camera begins ascending a steep, rocky slope, causing the canyon floor to drop away. The view is temporarily occluded by a large rock outcrop before the scene opens up to reveal the settlement more clearly ahead. Finally, the camera reaches a higher elevation, leaving the Imperial shuttle behind as a distant landmark in the sun-baked landscape.
